dialogs.blockDescription: Blocking this conversation will prevent the guest from sending new messages.
dialogs.deleteDescription: This action will permanently delete the conversation and all its messages. This cannot be undone.

errors.conversationDuplicate: An active conversation already exists for this accommodation.
errors.loadFailed: Could not load conversations. Please try reloading the page.
errors.messageContentBlocked: Your message contains content that is not allowed.

form.name: Name

form.requestAccessSent: If a conversation is associated with that email, we sent the access link. Check your inbox.
